en: Why do you laugh backwards? Why do I laugh backwards? I mean, that is a great question.
ko: 두 사람이랑 자야 하는데 나이 합이

en: I have a theory on this. Okay, now, I can't swear to it, but you've all seen the movie Aladdin, right?
And the guy rubs the lamp and the genie comes out and he grants the kid a wish.
Now, obviously, the genie is from the Middle East, right?
Ali Baba and the Forty Thieves, it's all that kind of thing, right?
So there's going to be a language barrier. I think at some point I met a genie and I got a wish,
and now there's been a mix-up in translation,
and instead of being hung like a donkey, I laugh like one.
ko: 인디아나 존스처럼 모자를 되찾은 기분이야. 이제 괜찮은 것 같아.

en: Do you wear a suit on your day off? Do I wear a suit on my day off? Yeah.
I dress like a fucking grown-up.
I'm just trying to serve as an example to this man in shorts.
Yeah. Yeah, I wear a suit every day.
I'm what you might call a gentleman.
I realise in Bromley, that's like, what? You mean he's in court every day?
What's something you tried but really regretted? What, sorry?
What's something you tried but really regretted?
Plastic surgery. In case anyone didn't hear, what's something you tried and regretted, and you said plastic surgery?
Sir, I would look surprised. I'm not capable anymore.
I can't do shots.
I am shocked. What, sorry?
Why are you named after a water company?
Aww. Was it funny in your head?
I'm named after a Caribbean nation, sir.
Jamaica. How famous are you?
How famous am I? What, you paid to be in a room with me?
I guess that's something, isn't it?
